technique_coaching.observation: In frames 20-21, the C-shape loop configuration is textbook perfect — excellent positioning around the appendage with proper clearance for cinching.

drill.name: Speed Loop Deployment
drill.description: Practice loop introduction and C-shape formation. Start with loop at entry point, advance to appendage, form C-shape, and position for cinching. Time each cycle.
drill.success_criteria: Achieve proper C-shape in under 25 seconds consistently

technique_coaching.observation: Frame 15 shows excellent '3 knots in a row' technique with proper hand positioning and sequential formation.
technique_coaching.why_it_matters: Your knot sequence is already at advanced level. This is a significant strength that provides security without time penalty.
technique_coaching.correction: No correction needed — this is exemplary technique. Protect this skill while working on other phases.

drill.name: Knot Consistency Check
drill.description: Form 3 extracorporeal knots in sequence. Focus on maintaining quality while slightly increasing pace.
drill.success_criteria: Consistent knot formation in under 15 seconds total

technique_coaching.observation: Frame 17 demonstrates proper 2cm tail length management — optimal for pusher engagement without excess material.
technique_coaching.why_it_matters: Correct tail length prevents pusher slippage and reduces cutting time. This attention to detail shows advanced understanding.
technique_coaching.correction: Continue this precise tail management. Consider pre-measuring during setup to save seconds during execution.

drill.name: Tail Length Consistency
drill.description: Practice achieving 2cm tails consistently during loop preparation. Use visual reference points on your instruments.

practice_plan.session_focus: Speed optimization while maintaining your excellent technique quality

warmup_drill.name: Instrument Familiarization
warmup_drill.description: Handle pusher and graspers through full range of motion. Practice smooth transitions between instruments.

primary_drill.name: Timed Phase Practice
primary_drill.description: Break task into phases: setup (target 15s), loop deployment (target 25s), cinching (target 20s), cutting (target 10s). Practice each phase separately with timing.
primary_drill.success_criteria: Hit phase targets while maintaining technique quality

integration_drill.name: Full Task Speed Run
integration_drill.description: Complete full endoloop task focusing on smooth phase transitions. Aim for sub-80s completion.
integration_drill.success_criteria: Sub-80s completion with secure loop placement

practice_plan.cooldown: Review which phases felt rushed vs. controlled. Identify the single phase with most time-saving potential.
practice_plan.estimated_sessions_to_improvement: 2-3 focused sessions to achieve consistent sub-80s performance
